title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. junceus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. junceus, also known as rubber rabbitbrush, is a shrub native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. junceus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
